title: Compliance Matrix
description: Structured sidecar for working/compliance-matrix.md. Produced by /compliance-check. Tracks every requirement from the solicitation's compliance sources through section assignment and draft status.

generated_by.description: Name of the skill that produced this file (e.g., 'compliance-check', 'proposal-manager')

compliance_sources.description: Parts of the solicitation that drive the matrix, from the proposal type's frontmatter

rows.description: One entry per 'shall' or scored requirement from the compliance sources

source.description: Which compliance source this row came from

requirement.description: Verbatim requirement text, trimmed to <=200 chars

section.description: Where in the draft this requirement is addressed (e.g., 'drafts/technical-approach.md §3.2'). Null if not yet assigned.

page.description: Page reference in the final document. Typically 'TBD' until final assembly.

status.description: Current coverage status. See compliance-matrix-template.md for definitions.

evidence.description: 1-line note pointing to supporting evidence in the draft, or rationale for Exception status

evidence_refs.description: Evidence ledger references (Phase C). Optional in Phase A.

coverage_pct.description: Percentage of rows with Status in {Covered, Drafted} out of total
